name: Sleepover At Laminax
description:
What could possibly go wrong, eh? Well.. Besides worrying if the humans and gootraxians can get along without violence.

Note that most of the Gootrax are their V3.1 designs

The first Kaiju Paradise bot I've made so far. Don't plan on making more. Couldn't find a good image for this bot either since most people don't bother putting multiple Gootraxians in one art.

kitty :3
creator: Oceancrawler
